content_body: Thank you for sharing your home with us. It is difficult to leave the warmth of this cabin, the beautiful mountain views, and the great feeling of expanse that rests in this place. We are sure to come again, to return to the heathery blues of the distance, the warm pinks and oranges that tuck you in at night, and the lone bright moon looking over. Your attention to every detail made our stay peaceful and easy. May there always be peace and joy in your lives.
title: Exquisite Beauty in North Georgia
